ogTitle: Sarina Beach vs Saunders Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sarina Beach and Saunders Beach.
heading: Sarina Beach vs Saunders Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sarina Beach, Queensland and Saunders Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sarina Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Saunders Beach (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sarina Beach or Saunders Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sarina Beach has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Saunders Beach scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sarina Beach scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Saunders Beach scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sarina Beach or Saunders Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sarina Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
